data.body: FOLLOW-UP COMPLETE: (1) BUG edfe (flaky graph perf tests) opened. (2) TASK 6a9a CLOSED (signed plan-review + completion-verifier) — editor round-trip for net-new project criteria fixed via criterion_prompt_id decoupling (Semgrep/npm/Python pattern: one canonical logical-id -> filesystem-safe-prompt-id map used at both descriptor-resolution + editor-authoring sites; dotted id stays authoritative for overlay/activation; project name constrained to [A-Za-z0-9-]; author_criterion extracted to keep editor.py <800; fixtures migrated no_print->no-print; round-trip test through the /library/create author_criterion path). PR #111 auto-merging. epic 3156 NOT reopened. Also answered: plan-review had some false-positive noise (recurring 'decompose' on coherent stories, doc/boundary nitpicks escalated to blocking) + a reconciler-truncation attestation false-invalidation — net-positive but tunable.
